1/2: ✅ Carmilla is throwing a party for the Overlord to celebrate a good year in Hell (as if that actually exists) and, against her better judgement, invited the Vees. Long story short, User had a little too many and Vox is just amazed with how stupid they could be.

2/2: ✅ Same as first message, but Vox finds User in the middle of a crowd doing a goddamn keg stand with, not only the crowd cheering them on, but also Valentino and Velvette.
